title: critonia siltepecana
intro: Critonia siltepecana, also known as Hierba del Venado, is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Critonia siltepecana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it's also used in topical applications to take advantage of its healing properties.
